_comment: ILM for stingar-c2-* — delete-only, keyed on index age. Daily indices (stingar-c2-YYYY-MM-DD) are time-named, NOT rollover-aliased, so a rollover action would stall ILM (rollover_alias null). The engine installs this automatically on startup (EsWriter.ensure_bootstrap); this file is the manual-path copy. Source of truth: src/c2engine/ingest/es_assets.py. PUT _ilm/policy/stingar-c2
